title: Array Operations in JavaScript (Push, Pop, Shift and Unshift)
summary: JavaScript is a powerful programming language that offers several ways to manipulate arrays, which are one of the most commonly used data structures in JavaScript. content: JavaScript is a powerful programming language that offers several ways to manipulate arrays, which are one of the most commonly used data structures in JavaScript. Four important array manipulation methods are push, pop, shift, and unshift. These methods allow you to add and remove elements from the beginning or end of an array. In this blog, we will discuss these methods and their usage in JavaScript.
